title: tablecodec conformance INDEX
description: Machine-readable manifest of conformance test cases (SPEC §11).

$schema.description: Relative or absolute pointer to this schema.

version.description: Conformance corpus version (independent of library version).

codec.description: Registry name of the codec used to read the sample.

sample.description: Repo-relative path to the input record(s).

expectation.description: Repo-relative path to the expected IR JSON.

description.description: Human-readable summary of what the case exercises.
